medium_card_1.description: The model card claims 94% accuracy in the text but the evaluation table shows 84% on the test set. This is a direct contradiction.
medium_card_1.suggested_fix: Reconcile the accuracy claim with the evaluation table. Report a single consistent number with methodology.

medium_card_1.description: Bias analysis states 'We checked for bias and it is fine' with no methodology, metrics, demographic groups tested, or quantitative results.
medium_card_1.suggested_fix: Include specific demographic groups tested, evaluation metrics used, disaggregated performance data, and methodology description.

medium_card_2.description: Model description says 'BiLSTM-CRF model' but also mentions 'Transformer encoder architecture'. These are fundamentally different architectures.
medium_card_2.suggested_fix: Clarify whether the model is BiLSTM-CRF or Transformer-based and remove the contradictory reference.

medium_card_2.description: Claims 'state-of-the-art F1 of 0.94' but the detailed table shows overall F1 of 0.81. The numbers contradict each other.
medium_card_2.suggested_fix: Report consistent metrics. If 0.94 refers to a different evaluation, clarify the methodology.

medium_card_2.description: Bias analysis claims the model is 'fair across all populations' with zero supporting evidence, methodology, or metrics. This is a medical NER model where bias can have serious consequences.
medium_card_2.suggested_fix: Conduct and document bias analysis across patient demographics, clinical settings, and document types.

medium_card_2.description: Training data comes from a single hospital system (Boston). Generalizability to other healthcare systems, regions, or demographics is not discussed.
medium_card_2.suggested_fix: Document the geographic and demographic limitations of the training data and expected generalization gaps.

medium_card_3.description: Model description says 'Transformer-based encoder-decoder' but training_data section says 'standard RNN with attention'. These are different architectures.
medium_card_3.suggested_fix: Clarify the actual model architecture and ensure consistency across all sections.

medium_card_3.description: Reports BLEU scores but explicitly notes 'no confidence intervals are provided'. Also reports different scores on public vs. proprietary test sets without explanation.
medium_card_3.suggested_fix: Add confidence intervals, bootstrap estimates, or multiple-run statistics. Clarify the proprietary test set methodology.

medium_card_3.description: Reports 200 TPU-hours but states 'carbon footprint not measured'. Environmental impact section is incomplete.
medium_card_3.suggested_fix: Estimate and report carbon footprint using available calculators like ML CO2 Impact.
